text: BREAKING: Trump declares ceasefire on 'massive life support' after rejecting Iran's 10-point counter-proposal as 'garbage' and 'stupid.' Emergency Situation Room meeting with Vance, Rubio, Hegseth, Gen. Caine, CIA Ratcliffe. Discussing resuming Project Freedom and airstrikes on remaining 25% of Iranian targets.
verificationNote: Axios, CNN, NBC all confirmed Situation Room meeting and Trump's rejection. Multiple senior US officials sourced.

text: ASSESSMENT: Hezbollah conducted 24 attack waves in 24 hours using explosive drones (fiber-optic FPV), rocket barrages, artillery, guided missiles. Released footage of drone striking Iron Dome battery. Fiber-optic drones remain unjammable — IDF admits no countermeasure. Israel Defense Ministry issued public call for solutions.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera Day 74 and Alma Center weekly report confirmed. CNN and NBC confirmed fiber-optic drone threat assessment.

text: NUCLEAR THREAT: Iran MP Ebrahim Rezaei (National Security Committee spokesman) warns on X that Iran could enrich to 90% weapons-grade if attacked again. Iran holds 440.9 kg of 60%-enriched uranium — enough for ~10 weapons. Netanyahu on 60 Minutes demanded uranium removal: 'You go in, and you take it out.'
verificationNote: Euronews and Times of Israel confirmed Rezaei threat. CBS News published full Netanyahu 60 Minutes transcript.

text: LEBANON: IDF struck 85+ Hezbollah targets in 24h — 51 killed including 2 medics from Islamic Health Society in Toul, Nabatieh. Israeli drone triple-tap strike killed Syrian father and 12-year-old daughter. IDF reservist Glovanyov (47) killed by Hezbollah drone. 74 total killed over 3 days. 103 medical workers killed since March 2.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera, JNS, PBS confirmed strike details. Times of Israel confirmed IDF reservist death. Lebanese Health Ministry figures.

text: DIPLOMACY: UK-France hosting 40-nation defense ministers meeting May 13 on Hormuz multinational mission. France deploying carrier Charles de Gaulle; UK sending HMS Dragon. Iran warns warships face 'decisive and immediate response.' Trump-Xi Beijing summit set May 14-15 to pressure China on Iran.
verificationNote: Times of Israel and Newsweek confirmed UK-France meeting. CNBC and NPR confirmed Beijing summit.

text: SANCTIONS: Treasury 'Economic Fury' designates 12 entities for IRGC oil sales to China. Targets: Shahid Purja'fari Oil HQ, Golden Globe Demir Celik (Turkey), HK Blue Ocean Ltd. $15M reward for IRGC financial info. Announced days before Trump's Beijing visit. Total new sanctions this week: 26 entities.
verificationNote: Bloomberg and UPI confirmed sanctions. State Department press release verified.

text: OIL/ECONOMY: Brent surged 2.9% to $104.21 (+30.5% from pre-war $79.84). WTI $98.07 (+29.9%). Hegseth faces Congress on $29B war cost — Pentagon requests $1.5T defense budget. Gas $4.52 — Trump eyes gas tax suspension. S&P 500 hit record 7,412 despite war. IMF: global growth cut to 3.1%. Hormuz Day 71.
verificationNote: CNBC confirmed oil prices and S&P. Washington Post confirmed Hegseth hearings. NPR confirmed gas tax. AAA confirmed gas price.
